jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at MyGlamm
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with MyGlamm! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About MyGlamm:
MyGlamm is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MyGlamm!
